decisions.rationale: The packet explicitly required the final report text to remain unchanged, and the SHA-256 matched before result generation.
Readability improvements were recorded for orchestrator review, but no recommendation was applied to the report text in this role.
Claim trace entries use only the captured PyPA documentation URLs provided in the packet and source ledger.
